name: Di[c]E
short_description: Di[c]E is a 3D survival game where dice are your only weapons. Craft equipment to grow stronger and defeat hostile forces. Uncover the secrets of a mysterious island and find a way to escape.
detailed_description:
Stranded on a strange island where ancient hostile forces lurk in the shadows, you must survive, explore... and find your way home.

Scavenge for water, food, shelter. Battle disease, exhaustion, and despair.

Forage, mine, fish, cook—but also fight. Craft equipment to gain unique Power Dice (wood/silver/gold), swaying your fate in critical moments.

Key actions—especially combat—are resolved through dice rolls. Forge gear tailored to each challenge, and outmaneuver dangers in a living world ruled by day/night cycles.

What secrets does this island hold? What are you truly fleeing? And how far will you go to survive?

KEY FEATURES

  • Struggle to survive in a hostile environment and find a way back to civilization.

  • Explore the island and gather resources to meet vital needs while avoiding disease, exhaustion, or despair.

  • Upgrade your camp to improve rest, healing, and survival conditions.

  • Craft equipment to obtain Power Dice (Wood/Silver/Gold) suited for every challenge.

  • Uncover secrets of an island both beautiful and eerie, shaped by day-night cycles.

  • Reveal the truth behind your arrival, the hero’s intentions, and the shadows of their past.

  • Face enemies in turn-based combat where strategy and dice decide your fate.

Dice or Die offers unique tabletop-inspired gameplay.
Most critical actions are resolved by dice rolls, adding uncertainty to your journey.

Acquire these Power Dice through equipment—crafted in wood, silver, or gold tiers.
